title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
